title: Payee: handle Request → auto-respond with stub address
description: When ClearMessage::Payment action=Request arrives and no session exists for session_id (we are payee): create PaymentSession with role=Payee, state=Requested. Echo '[payment] <handle> wants to pay you <amount> <chain>.' Auto-respond with PaymentAction::Address { chain, address: 'stub-<pub_id_short>-<session_short>' } — a placeholder since real Sapling address generation needs zcash_primitives (blocked). Transition state to AddressProvided. The stub address string makes clear it is not real.
